summary: Created complete SKILL.md with AI reasoning instructions for action conversation detection, task completion assessment, next step inference, and task extraction from meetings. Added comprehensive reasoning examples (5 scenarios each) and integration documentation covering thread-close, meeting-ingestion, morning/evening briefings, and scheduled agents.
notes_for_orchestrator: Design decisions: 1) Emphasized 'Scripts gather context, AI reasons semantically' principle throughout SKILL.md to reinforce the division of labor. 2) Included 5 detailed reasoning examples each for action detection and completion assessment to cover edge cases. 3) Created separate integration.md documenting how other skills (thread-close, meeting-ingestion) call task-system. 4) Added explicit 'Show V the assessment and ask for confirmation' in completion assessment to prevent auto-completion errors. No blockers encountered.
